landing.heroDesc: Spark AI helps children and teenagers master AI through creative missions and interactive learning. Prepare your child for the future today.
landing.frameworkDesc: We teach four key pillars that empower children to become fluent in communicating with AI.
landing.frameworkD1Desc: Learning which tasks to share with AI and which to keep. Understanding human-machine collaboration.
landing.frameworkD2Desc: The art of giving clear instructions (prompts). Precision in language leads to better results from AI.
landing.frameworkD3Desc: Critical thinking. Distinguishing between truth and nonsense in AI responses.
landing.frameworkD4Desc: Ethics and responsibility. Ensuring AI is used constructively and honestly.
landing.pricingDesc: Start for free, upgrade when your child is ready for bigger adventures.
landing.pricingCardFreeDesc: For kids taking their first steps in the world of AI.
landing.pricingCardProDesc: Everything your child needs to become an AI genius.
landing.faq1Q: What age is Spark AI for?
landing.faq1A: The platform is specifically designed for children aged 10 to 14. The tasks and interface are tailored to their developmental level.
landing.faq2A: Yes, absolutely. All AI interactions go through our custom safety filters. The AI cannot search the internet or share personal information about the child.
landing.faq3Q: Do I, as a parent, need to know AI?
landing.faq3A: Not at all. The parent dashboard explains exactly what the child is learning and even gives you suggestions for conversation topics at home.
landing.footer: © 2026 Spark by Antigravity. All rights reserved.

methodology.desc: We don't just teach children to use AI, but to understand it, control it, and evaluate it critically.
methodology.d1Desc: Learning which tasks suit AI and which should stay in our hands. We encourage collaboration where the machine works but the child steers the process.
methodology.d2Desc: The art of communicating with technology. Clear commands and precise language are the key to success in the AI world.
methodology.d3Desc: Critical thinking is the core. We teach kids to identify errors, bias, and evaluate the truthfulness of what the AI outputs.
methodology.d4Desc: Final polish and responsibility. The child has the final word and is responsible for the output. We emphasize refining, reviewing, and making the work their own.
methodology.safeDesc: We build Spark on a solid foundation where ethics and safety go hand in hand.
methodology.safe1Desc: A secure environment where children's data is never used to train public models or sold to third parties.
methodology.safe2Desc: Instead of getting the answers, children learn to ask the right questions and develop deeper understanding.
methodology.safe3Desc: A complete overview of the child's progress and interactions, with tools to discuss the technology at home.
methodology.ctaDesc: Register your child for the future today and see how our 4D framework transforms curiosity into skills.
